title: astelma retorta
intro: Astelma retorta, also known as Peruvian valerian or Valeriana peruviana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its sedative and antispasmodic effects, which help in reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation. The health benefits of Astelma retorta include its ability to alleviate insomnia, menstrual cramps, and restlessness, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Astelma retorta can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
